title: corunastylis ciliata
intro: Corunastylis ciliata, also known as the ciliate greenhood orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and treating skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the ciliate greenhood orchid is often made into infusions or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
